dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses EMA-based trend following with monthly rebalancing. Since exact EMA period (lookback/half_life) is AUTHOR_SILENT, used ema_100 as a standard medium-term trend filter. Monthly rebalancing (approximately 21 trading days) is represented via hold_days_max. Position direction flips based on price crossing the EMA: LONG above, SHORT below. Exit is triggered by price crossing back through the EMA in the opposite direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses EMA-based trend following with monthly rebalancing. Since exact EMA period (lookback/half_life) is AUTHOR_SILENT, used ema_100 as a standard medium-term trend filter. Monthly rebalancing (approximately 21 trading days) is represented via hold_days_max. Position direction flips based on price crossing the EMA: LONG above, SHORT below. Exit is triggered by price crossing back through the EMA in the opposite direction.

source_rule_text: Long futures trading above their exponential moving average and short those below it, with monthly rebalancing across a diversified basket of 24 futures contracts.
